reviews.comment:
Si pasas por los menucos no podés dejar de parar por el ACA, permitite media hora para un buen café con leche con medialunas en un lugar que parece detenido en el tiempo... Excelente atención... Lugar con Wi-Fi. Y TV LCD para actualizarte de las noticias. Si llegas al mediodía es recomendable su cocina del día o minutas... Lo cocinan todo en el momento así que paciencia... No es un fastfood... Pero te garantiza la calidad y frescura de la comida.

(Translated by Google)
If you're passing through Los Menucos, you absolutely must stop by the ACA. Allow yourself half an hour for a delicious café con leche and medialunas in a place that seems frozen in time. Excellent service. They have Wi-Fi and an LCD TV to catch up on the news. If you arrive around lunchtime, their daily specials or quick meals are highly recommended. Everything is cooked to order, so be patient. It's not fast food, but they guarantee the quality and freshness of the food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRd0tUYTB3RRAB
